structurePatterns: Same as Input component but with magnifier icon on the left
Clear button appears on the right when value is present
usageHints: Use toolbar variant for page-level search (--layout-control-height: 36px)
Compact variant for inline filter/search bars (28px)
Clear button uses ghost button interaction — no visible border
Search icon is ALWAYS ink-tertiary, never accent blue
doNotInvent: Blue search icon — search icon is ink-tertiary (#9B9B9B)
Rounded-pill search bar — use md radius (8px)
Autocomplete dropdown in the search component — it's a separate component
